basic_details.job_title: ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has officially announced the Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 for 1 contractual vacancy. Candidates possessing an MBBS degree from a recognized institution with a minimum of 3 years of experience after internship are eligible to apply. Interested applicants can submit their offline applications on or before 20 July 2026. The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 95,000. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for complete eligibility criteria, application procedure, and selection details.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with minimum 03 years experience after internship
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS degree with a minimum of 03 years of experience after internship. Additional qualifications in Medicine or Surgery are preferable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Medical Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ECHS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the ECHS Medical Officer position is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree and have a minimum of 03 years of experience after completing their internship. Additional qualifications in Medicine or Surgery are considered preferable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Medical Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 95,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the ECHS Medical Officer vacancy?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this ECHS Medical Officer recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the Medical Officer position under the EX- Servicemen Contributary Health Scheme (ECHS) recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ECHS Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer post will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview based on their eligibility and application.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Medical Officer position is contractual. This means the appointment will be for a specific period as per the terms and conditions of the scheme.

faq.question: Q10. What is the tentative interview date for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The tentative interview date for the Medical Officer position is 25th July 2026. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview on or around this date.
